SEARCH
Package client.view

Class UsageReportController

java.lang.Object
client.view.BaseController
client.view.UsageReportController
public class UsageReportController extends BaseController
Usage report screen. It shows the required operational information: dates and parks in which the park was not fully occupied during the selected range.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    private static final record 
    UsageReportController.ParkOption
    Park dropdown entry: id is null for all parks.
